use_cases: Displaying countdown for limited-time offers or flash sales in e-commerce
Tracking remaining time for timed assessments or quizzes in education platforms
Showing countdown for event start times or product launches
Timer functionality for focus sessions or productivity tools
Countdown display for cooking timers or task management
ai_summary: A countdown timer component built with Ark UI that displays hours, minutes, and seconds in a clean monospace format. Features start, pause, and reset controls with basic hover states, supporting dark mode for both desktop and mobile platforms. Uses a minimalist flat design with standard UI button styling.
